scaffold:
Step 1: Start facing north.

Step 2: Turn left 270 degrees.
Turning left 270 degrees is the same as turning right 90 degrees, so north → east.

Step 3: Turn left 180 degrees.
East → west.

Step 4: Turn right 180 degrees.
West → east.

Step 5: Turn left 180 degrees.
East → west.

Step 6: Turn left 270 degrees.
Turning left 270 degrees is the same as right 90 degrees, so west → north.

Step 7: Turn right 90 degrees.
North → east.

FINAL: East
wrong_scaffold:
Step 1: Start facing north.

Step 2: Turn left 270 degrees.  
A left turn of 270 degrees is the same as a right turn of 90 degrees, so from north you end up facing east.

Step 3: Turn left 180 degrees.  
Turning 180 degrees from east puts you facing west.

Step 4: Turn right 180 degrees.  
A 180-degree turn reverses your direction, so from west you end up facing east.

Step 5: Turn left 180 degrees.  
Turning 180 degrees from east puts you facing west again.

Step 6: Turn left 270 degrees.  
From west, turning left 270 degrees puts you facing south.

Step 7: Turn right 90 degrees.  
From south, a right turn of 90 degrees puts you facing west.

FINAL: west
compressed:
Start: N

1. L270 = R90: N -> E  
2. L180: E -> W  
3. R180: W -> E  
4. L180: E -> W  
5. L270 = R90: W -> N  
6. R90: N -> E  

Check: sequence N -> E -> W -> E -> W -> N -> E, so final direction is East.

FINAL: East
